features: User Registration and Authentication: Users can sign up and log in using email or social media accounts. Includes password recovery and two-factor authentication for security.
Video Uploading: Users can upload videos with a drag-and-drop interface. Supports multiple formats and resolutions with progress indicators and error handling for unsupported formats.
Video Playback: High-quality video player with adjustable resolution, playback speed, and volume controls. Includes a fullscreen mode and picture-in-picture functionality.
User Profiles: Each user has a customizable profile page displaying their uploaded videos, playlists, and subscriptions. Users can add profile pictures and bios.
Search Functionality: Advanced search with filters for video type, upload date, and categories. Includes auto-suggestions and a recent searches history.
Video Categories and Tags: Videos can be categorized and tagged for easy navigation. Users can browse by categories such as Trending, Music, Gaming, etc.
Commenting and Interaction: Users can comment on videos, reply to comments, and like or dislike comments. Includes moderation tools for reporting inappropriate comments.
Playlists: Users can create and manage playlists, adding videos from different creators. Includes options for public, private, and collaborative playlists.
Recommendations Engine: Personalized video recommendations based on user watch history and preferences. Includes a 'Watch Next' section on the video player page.
Notifications: Users receive notifications for new subscribers, comments on their videos, and replies to their comments. Includes a notification center for easy access.
User Engagement Analytics: Creators can view detailed analytics on their videos, including views, watch time, audience demographics, and engagement metrics.
Responsive Design: Mobile-friendly design with a responsive layout that adapts to various screen sizes, ensuring a seamless experience on smartphones and tablets.
Dark Mode: Option for users to switch between light and dark themes for comfortable viewing in different lighting conditions.
Loading States: Placeholder animations while videos are loading, with a friendly message for users. Includes a retry option if loading fails.
Empty States: Informative messages and suggestions when a user has no uploaded videos, playlists, or subscriptions, encouraging them to explore content.
Feedback Mechanism: Users can provide feedback on the platform through a dedicated feedback form, with options for reporting bugs or suggesting features.
Multi-page Navigation: Clear navigation bar with links to Home, Trending, Subscriptions, Library, and Profile. Breadcrumbs for easy backtracking.
Watch Later Feature: Users can save videos to a 'Watch Later' list for easy access later. Includes a notification when saved videos are trending.
Multi-Language Support: Option for users to select their preferred language for the interface and subtitles for videos, enhancing accessibility.
Content Moderation: Automated and manual review processes for uploaded content to ensure compliance with community guidelines, with user reporting options.
